---
title: "Tableau"
output:
  html_document:
    highlight: tango
---

[<img src="C:/Users/reidh/Documents/GitHub/rhaefer.github.io/images/tableau_dashboard.png">](https://public.tableau.com/views/project_selection_RH/Story1?:embed=y&:display_count=yes)

![](C:/Users/reidh/Documents/GitHub/rhaefer.github.io/tableau_dashboard.png)
